ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the product (e.g., units, cases) */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product */,
  "product_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "product_dimension" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum storage capacity of the warehouse */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product in the warehouse */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory record was last updated */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the product is set to expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_demand" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order demand record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "order_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_demand_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_demand_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., warehouse manager, inventory analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouse_managers" (
  "warehouse_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse manager */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the user started managing the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouse_managers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouse_managers_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_description" TEXT /* Description of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., stock in, stock out) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_transactions_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id")
)
column_names: Unit of measure for the product (e.g., units, cases)
